subcodes.first_line: O servants of the All-Merciful and handmaidens of the Lord God! Though that noble Being hath winged His flight unto the Kingdom of Light and ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عباد رحمن و اماء حضرت یزدان هر چند آن بزرگوار بملکوت انوار پرواز نمود و شما
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
